## Question
State your question clearly and concisely.

## Context
Provide relevant context to help us give a precise answer. Include:
- The module or component this relates to (e.g., Vision Intelligence, Asset Service, API)
- What you have already tried or researched
- Any error messages or unexpected behavior you encountered

## Environment (if applicable)
- AEGON Version:
- Deployment Environment: [Local / K8s / Render / etc.]
- Python / Node.js Version:
